CPC_NG470_00.02.26_Appl_003_reserved.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E5
Recv ID: 7ED
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 91
Func Name: LBC (HEV) CPC
